title: jurinea mollissima
intro: Jurinea mollissima, also known as Mongolian thistle or Chinese thistle, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Jurinea mollissima can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various diseases.
